site_title: Rafael Gálvez Silipo — Web Audit & Development
hero_title: I audit, build, and optimize websites
hero_subtitle: I help businesses and professionals achieve a fast, accessible, and effective web presence. Technical diagnosis, development from scratch, and ongoing optimization.
about_p1: SMR student at Digitech FP Malaga with a strong passion for technology. I've been involved in software development since age 10, training for 4 years in programming.
about_p2: My focus is on making websites work better — faster, more accessible, and more effective. I believe in meticulous work, attention to detail, and clear communication with every client.
about_p3: I complement my education with Cisco NetAcad certifications and hands-on experience in web application development and diagnostics.
highlight_cert: Cisco NetAcad: Ethical Hacker, Python, Networking, Linux
highlight_started: Programming since age 10 · EVAD Kids (4 years)
section_services_subtitle: Every project receives meticulous attention, from initial diagnosis to final delivery.
service_audit_desc: Comprehensive review of performance, technical SEO, accessibility, and best practices. You'll receive a detailed report with prioritized findings and actionable recommendations.
service_dev_desc: Creation of modern, responsive, and optimized websites. From landing pages to full web applications using current technologies.
service_consulting_desc: Analysis and improvement of existing sites: load speed, user experience, and conversion. Custom strategy to boost your digital presence.
section_process_subtitle: A clear, structured process to ensure quality results in every project.
step_1_desc: We discuss your project, your goals, and the specific needs of your website. I define the scope and set clear expectations from the start.
step_2_desc: I perform a thorough technical analysis of your current site or the market you want to enter. I identify areas for improvement and concrete opportunities.
step_3_desc: I present a detailed action plan with the tasks to be done, technologies to use, and a time estimate. No surprises, everything in writing.
step_4_desc: I develop, optimize, or fine-tune your website following best practices. I keep you updated on progress with regular updates.
step_5_desc: Final performance, accessibility, and functionality testing. I deliver the project with documentation and maintenance recommendations.
section_contact_subtitle: Tell me about your project and I'll be happy to help you achieve your digital goals.
form_success: Message sent. Thanks for reaching out.
